content_body:
Such a serene and relaxed place to be!  We have enjoyed our time at Serendipity.  We stayed our last 3 nights of our honeymoon here, and this will be one vacation that we will never forget.  Thank you to our longtime friends, Gary, Lissa, Taylor, and Travis!  We hope to be back soon, but this time with more family and friends!  

Ronnie and Chris
title: Honeymoon in Blue Ridge
